flags.title: California residents only
flags.body: COSMOS accepts students completing grades 8–12 who are enrolled in a California high school. Out-of-state students are not eligible.

flags.title: $200 deposit non-refundable
flags.body: A $200 deposit is required to hold a spot and is non-refundable — including for students who receive full financial aid.
flags.sourceCitation: COSMOS program fee and deposit policy

flags.title: ~4% acceptance rate
flags.body: MIT RSI accepts approximately 4% of applicants globally. Admission is among the most competitive of any U.S. pre-college program.
flags.sourceCitation: Center for Excellence in Education / RSI program materials

flags.title: PSAT Math 740+ practical floor
flags.body: While not a published cutoff, successful applicants typically score PSAT Math 740 or higher. Strong math and science preparation is effectively required.
flags.sourceCitation: RSI applicant guidance and alumni admissions patterns

flags.title: Fully funded for accepted students
flags.body: All accepted RSI students attend tuition-free. Room, board, and program costs are covered for admitted participants.

flags.title: SEVP certification terminated
flags.body: Harvard SSP's SEVP certification was terminated in May 2025. International students must verify current visa and enrollment eligibility directly with Harvard before applying.
flags.sourceCitation: U.S. Department of Homeland Security SEVP announcement, May 2025

flags.title: 55% campus crime rate increase (2022–2023)
flags.body: Harvard reported a 55% increase in campus crime between 2022 and 2023. Review the university's Annual Security Report when evaluating a residential summer enrollment.
flags.sourceCitation: Harvard University Annual Security Report (Clery Act)

flags.title: Historical abuse allegations and donor history
flags.body: Interlochen has faced historical abuse allegations, underwent an external investigation, and received donations from Jeffrey Epstein from 1990 to 2003. Review recent safety reporting and institutional responses before enrolling.
flags.sourceCitation: Public reporting, external investigation findings, and institutional disclosures

flags.title: Mandatory solo wilderness camping
flags.body: Outward Bound courses require a solo wilderness camping period, typically 24–72 hours, as a core part of the curriculum.
flags.sourceCitation: Outward Bound USA course structure and participant requirements

flags.title: Low seasonal staff pay
flags.body: Overland Summers staff typically earn $2,000–3,000 per summer. This compensation level may contribute to high staff turnover relative to longer-tenured outdoor programs.

flags.title: $550 non-refundable deposit
flags.body: Wake Forest requires a $550 non-refundable deposit in addition to tuition.
flags.sourceCitation: Wake Forest Summer Immersion fee schedule
